name: QA 1137
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1137

Check new cpu-util.conf derived metrics 



Copyright (c) 2017-2018 Red Hat.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404 reproduce
